hero.eyebrow: Welcome to Church of New Hope
hero.title: Love God. Love People.
hero.description: We're a church dedicated to helping people know Jesus, grow in faith, and impact Charlotte with the Gospel.

welcome.title: About Church of New Hope
welcome.body: Whether you've been walking with Jesus for decades or are just beginning to ask questions, you'll find a warm welcome at Church of New Hope. We gather on Sundays in two languages for Bible-rooted teaching, authentic worship, and fellowship in a family-friendly environment.

worship.title: Christ-Centered Worship
worship.body: Lift your voice and proclaim the name of Jesus in communal worship.

teaching.title: Bible-rooted teaching
teaching.body: Hear practical messages rooted in Scripture in both English and Ukrainian.

kids.title: Intentional Kid's Ministry
kids.body: Access safe age-appropriate Bible classes. Nursery also available.

fellowship.title: Real community
fellowship.body: Join us after service for coffee, conversation, and genuine fellowship.

groupsCta.title: Get connected
groupsCta.body: We have over a dozen active Bible studies, prayer groups, and ministry groups meeting across Charlotte, Matthews, and Indian Trail in both English and Ukrainian.

giveCta.title: Support Church of New Hope
giveCta.body: Every gift supports our worship services, ministries, missions, and outreach across our city.

aboutChurch.description: Gospel-centered teaching enriches understanding of faith, while powerful worship inspires and uplifts the spirit. An active community encourages connection and support among individuals, creating a vibrant atmosphere for growth and fellowship in both Ukrainian and English.

smallGroups.title: Small Groups
smallGroups.subtitle: Get involved in our vibrant community!
smallGroups.description: Small groups are where deep growth and connection happens in our church. We have groups that meet all over Charlotte for families, men, women, and young adults in both languages.

getConnected.title: Get Connected
getConnected.subtitle: Join Our Community
getConnected.description: We'd love to get to know you better! Fill out our connection form to let us know you're interested in becoming part of our church family. We'll reach out and help you take the next steps in your journey with us.

weBelieve.title: Statement of faith

hero.title: Our Statement of Faith
hero.description: Though we worship in two languages, we are one congregation united in one Gospel, proclaiming one name: Jesus Christ.

god.title: God
god.text: We believe that there is only one true, living, and eternal God and that the Godhead is revealed as Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

bible.title: The Bible
bible.text: We believe that the Holy Scriptures are the Old and New Testaments; the inspired and infallible Word of God and therein is found the only reliable guide of Christian faith and conduct.

man.title: Man
man.text: We believe that God created man in His own image to bring Him honor through obedience, and that when man disobeyed, he became a fallen and sinful creature, unable to save himself. We believe that infants are in the covenant of God's grace and that all persons become accountable to God when they reach a state of moral responsibility.

salvation.title: Salvation
salvation.text: We believe that salvation (regeneration, sanctification, justification, and redemption) has been provided for all mankind through the redemptive work (life, death, resurrection, ascension, and intercession) of Jesus Christ, and that this salvation can be received only through repentance toward God and faith toward our Lord Jesus Christ.

assurance.title: Assurance and Endurance
assurance.text: We believe that those who abide in Christ have the assurance of salvation. However, we believe that the Christian retains his freedom of choice; therefore, it is possible for him to turn away from God and be finally lost.

duties.title: Christian Duties
duties.text: We believe that Christians should live faithfully by serving in and through the local church, praying diligently, witnessing earnestly, practicing tolerance, showing loving kindness, giving as God prospers, and conducting themselves in such a way as to bring glory to God.

church.title: The Church
church.text: We believe that the Church Universal is the Body of Christ, the fellowship of all believers, and that its members have been called out from the world to come under the dominion and authority of Christ, its Head. We believe that a local church is a fellowship of Christians, a part of the Body of Christ, voluntarily banded together for worship, nurture, and service.

ordinances.title: Ordinances
ordinances.text: We believe that baptism and the Lord's Supper are ordinances instituted by Christ to be observed by Christians only. We also believe that the biblical mode of baptism is immersion and that participation in the Lord's Supper should be open to all Christians.

lastThings.title: Resurrection
lastThings.text: We believe in the personal return of Jesus Christ, and in the bodily resurrection of the dead. We believe that God will judge all mankind by Jesus Christ; that He will reward the righteous with eternal life in heaven, and that He will banish the unrighteous to everlasting punishment in hell.

weBelieve.comeAsYouAre: Come as you are — we can't wait to meet you and share in a meaningful experience together.

leadership.title: Our Leadership
leadership.subtitle: Meet the pastors, directors, and volunteers who serve our church family.

hero.title: Our Team
hero.description: Meet the pastors, directors, and volunteers who serve our church family.

hero.eyebrow: We can't wait to see you
hero.title: Worship With Us
hero.description: Here's everything you need to know before walking through our doors.

what.title: What to expect
what.body: Services last from 60-90 minutes and include worship, prayer, and a Bible-based message. Make sure to stop by for coffee and fellowship between services. Your cup is free as a first-time guest!

wear.title: What to wear
wear.body: Wear whatever feels comfortable. You'll see jeans, dresses, suits, and everything in between. There's no dress code at New Hope. Come as you are, ready to worship!

kids.title: For your kids
kids.body: We love your kids! There are safe, age-appropriate Pre K-5 Sunday school classes available during Ukrainian service, and a nursery available during both services.

parking.title: Parking
parking.body: There is plenty of parking in our main lot and the gravel lot directly behind the church building. A member of the parking team will guide you when you arrive.

language.title: Both languages
language.body: English service begins at 10AM, and Ukrainian service begins at 12PM. All are welcome at both services.

questions.title: Have questions?
questions.body: Reach out to us any time at info@churchofnewhope.org

hero.title: Sermons
hero.description: Catch up on past messages or share with a friend. New videos posted in English and Ukrainian every week.

hero.title: Our Ministries
hero.description: Find community, grow in faith, and serve alongside others through the various ministries of our church, including men's and women's groups, prayer teams, and evangelism efforts.

hero.title: Submit a Prayer Request
hero.description: Fill out the form below to share a prayer request with our pastoral team. All submissions are private and shared only with CNH pastors unless otherwise requested.

form.name: Your name (optional)
form.emailPlaceholder: We'll only use this to follow up
form.shareNo: Keep this between me and the pastors
form.thanks: Thank you. We will pray for you.

prayer.verse: "Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you."

events.title: Events

hero.title: Upcoming events
hero.description: Join us for worship nights, community gatherings, outreach events and more.

events.subtitle: Join us for our upcoming services, gatherings, and special events. Check our calendar to see what's happening at Church of New Hope.

give.title: Give

hero.title: Give To Church of New Hope
hero.description: Every gift helps support the life and mission of our church through Sunday services, events, ministries, and missions efforts. Thank you for your generosity!

give.subtitle: Support the ministry of Church of New Hope through your generous giving. Choose any of the options below.

zelle.title: Zelle
zelle.description: Send your gift directly to our Zelle account. Fast, secure, and no fees. Please add a note with your gift.

paypal.title: PayPal
paypal.description: Donate securely through PayPal. Use your PayPal balance, a bank account, or any card.

onlineGiving.title: Online giving
onlineGiving.description: Use our secure online giving platform powered by Square. Accepts all major credit cards and bank transfers.

give.thankYou: Thank you for your generous support of our ministry!
give.taxDeductible: All donations are tax-deductible. You will receive a receipt for your records.

footer.connectText: Follow us on social media for daily encouragement, announcements, and live worship.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Church of New Hope. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Forms & Requests
hero.description: Everything you need in one place — connect with our church family, join a team, or submit a request to our staff.

connectCard.title: Connect Card
connectCard.desc: New here? Fill out our Connect Card so we can get to know you, answer any questions, and help you get connected at New Hope.

serveTeam.title: Serve Team
serveTeam.desc: Interested in serving? Complete this form to learn about volunteer opportunities and join a ministry team that matches your gifts and interests.

membership.title: Membership Application
membership.desc: Ready to make New Hope your church home? Submit this application to begin the membership process and learn more about becoming a member.

building.title: Church Building Request
building.desc: Use this form to request the use of church facilities for meetings, events, classes, or special gatherings.

operator.title: Operator Request
operator.desc: Submit this form to request audio, video, livestream, presentation, or other technical support for your event or ministry activity.

sermonSlides.title: Sermon Slides Request
sermonSlides.desc: Use this form to submit sermon notes, scriptures, and presentation details needed to prepare slides for worship services.

graphic.title: Graphic Request
graphic.desc: Need graphics for an event, ministry, or announcement? Submit this form to request flyers, social media graphics, presentation graphics, and other design projects.

help.title: Not sure which form you need?
help.body: Reach out to us any time at info@churchofnewhope.org and we'll point you in the right direction.
